effect.content: Primary: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease." Alternate: "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."

rule_text: Mechanism-of-action copy must use the approved primary statement ("Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.") or the approved alternate ("...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.") verbatim.
summary: Mechanism-of-action copy must use the exact approved primary or alternate LISRAYA statements verbatim without alterations.
